title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama repo: CLI tool and Go library to pull, build, and run Llama-2, Mistral, Gemma, etc. locally with GPU/Metal acceleration.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama REST API—chat, embed, pull, and list models from Node or browsers.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client and asyncio bindings for Ollama; chat, generate, create, and delete models with a few lines.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain adapter to use Ollama models as LLMs or chat endpoints inside LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui (formerly ollama-ui)
summary: Full-featured, self-hosted ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama with multi-user support, markdown, and code highlighting.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built interactive CLI that wraps Ollama with conversation history, syntax highlighting, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style inline suggestions and chat sidebar.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node-selector, PVC, and service exposure out of the box.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client library for Ollama (Spring Boot friendly) with synchronous, reactive, and Kotlin-coroutine flavors.

title: chainlit-ollama
summary: Chainlit integration to visualize and debug Ollama-powered conversational apps in an interactive web UI.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes: PDF Q&A, voice chat, function calling, RAG with Chroma, and fine-tuning examples for Ollama.

title: ollama-embeddings
summary: Lightweight service that exposes Ollama embedding models via OpenAI-compatible `/embeddings` endpoint for vector DBs.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim language wrapper for Ollama’s REST API with async/await and native JSON mapping.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem providing an idiomatic client for Ollama with concurrent streaming and Rails integration examples.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models using slash commands and thread isolation.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module to spin up Ollama containers in CI pipelines for testing LLM-dependent code without cloud calls.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds /ollama slash command for chatting with local models and supports private DMs and channels.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM prompts inside notes for summarization, translation, and brainstorming.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed, async/await bindings to Ollama’s REST API with tokio and serde.
